transcription.text: Stuck. Hopelessly stuck. We did it on purpose. Now let's put on a pair of Gulf Winter tires. Set the car back down into the same ruts and watch. What gives Gulf Winter tires a terrific pulling power? These treads designed for maximum traction. They bike through with a deep cleated and sure-footed grip and the special design prevents loss of traction caused by snow packing between the cleats. So this winter, relax. Get sure-footed safety from Gulf Winter tires. Buy them now. Where your driving takes a turn for the best. At the sign of the Gulf Orange Disc.
